title: Creative industries and Research and Development tax reliefs: administrative changes
body: "This measure clarifies the tax treatment of payments made between group companies in return for either surrendered:   Research and Development Expenditure Credit (RDEC) Audio-Visual Expenditure Credit (AVEC) Video Games Expenditure Credit (VGEC)   This measure:   updates the transitional rules between Video Games Tax Relief and VGEC  makes minor changes to special credit for visual effects, which is part of AVEC    "
